## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content production ramp up, workflow improvements, and onboarding new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/xcENUWLPQ1sMhDeVh3LZmzHBDyzt1Hq7?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sadira to produce 10-15 articles next week (5 for Firework, 5 for Arena)](https://fathom.video/share/xcENUWLPQ1sMhDeVh3LZmzHBDyzt1Hq7?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Explore ways to batch/streamline image generation process, potentially with freelancer help](https://fathom.video/share/xcENUWLPQ1sMhDeVh3LZmzHBDyzt1Hq7?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Leverage Anthropic's support (Cindy) to troubleshoot workflows and templates](https://fathom.video/share/xcENUWLPQ1sMhDeVh3LZmzHBDyzt1Hq7?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Bring on freelance writers to handle increased volume as new clients onboard](https://fathom.video/share/xcENUWLPQ1sMhDeVh3LZmzHBDyzt1Hq7?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Aim for 12 total clients by end of August through new leads and promotions](https://fathom.video/share/xcENUWLPQ1sMhDeVh3LZmzHBDyzt1Hq7?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
